videos.title: Undertale Plus LITE - Announcement Trailer
videos.description:
Undertale Plus LITE, a version of Undertale Plus without Add-Ons is coming to PC very soon! Explore a brand new completely customizable version of Undertale!

For more information please check out our website: https://www.undertaleplus.com/
You can also check out our recent devlog we pushed out for more information: https://gamejolt.com/p/undertale-plus...

Thank you to 2 years of Undertale Plus!

Trailer Credits:
Music Composer: garbyte
Thumbnail Art: Nelle Fox
Video Producers: CiblesGD, Zaywire
Creative Directors: CiblesGD, LuigiUTMC
Music Directors: Gramwra, Maddiesmiles
Undertale by Toby Fox. Undertale Soundtrack copyrighted by Materia Music.

Check out Undertale Plus - https://www.undertaleplus.com

Undertale Plus is an unofficial mod for Undertale and is unassociated with Undertale, Toby Fox, Materia Music, Fangamer, or Royal Sciences LLC.
videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição Heat. Heat. Heat. Heat.

videos.title: Undertale Plus - Reveal Trailer
videos.description:
Undertale Plus, a mod for Undertale allowing you to have a completely customizable experience, will be coming to PC soon! Play with colored sprites, your friends, Deltarune battles, and more!

Check out our website: https://www.undertaleplus.com

Reveal Trailer showcased in UnderEvent 2024. Watch the full presentation here:    • UNDEREVENT 2024: Shadows Manifest | Undert...
